phoneticUs: ﾋ渓rﾉ騨刃oﾊ鈎aﾉｪﾋ伊騨人ﾉ囘ﾊ段; ﾋ渓rﾉ騨刃ﾉ冀aﾉｪﾋ伊騨人ﾉ囘ﾊ段
meaning: n.[逕歉譌ｶ髣ｴ逕溽黄蟄ｦ,逕溽黄髓溷ｭｦ
examples: Please introduce chronobiology and describe some practical applications.
Please describe how modern life has made chronobiology largely irrelevant.
This is the webpage of Chronobiology International.
This field is known as chronobiology and it has created one of the most underestimated sets of data in all of psychiatry.
Dr Higgs, a researcher in the deep sea who works from London, and Oban-based marine chronobiology investigator Dr Last, have hopes of carrying out the UK's first deep water investigation.
